Imports

ir, specparser

Types

Generator = ref object
  pkg*: Package
  outputDir*: string
  pkgName*: string
  pkgIdent*: string
  baseUri*: string
  genTime*: string
  schemas*: OrderedTableRef[string, Schema]
  authType*: string
  oauthTokenUrl*: string
  oauthAuthUrl*: string

Procs

proc genEndpoint(path: string; skipPrefixPath: sink string = ""): tuple[
    ident, module, endpoint: string] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    tuple[path: string, meth: string, operation: Operation]];
                     schemas: OrderedTableRef[string, Schema]; pkgIdent: string): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc generate(gen: Generator) {....raises: [OSError, IOError, KeyError], tags: [
    ReadDirEffect, WriteDirEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}

                       schemas: OrderedTableRef[string, Schema]): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

    seq[tuple[path: string, meth: string, operation: Operation]]] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc newGenerator(pkg: Package; outputDir: string): Generator {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [TimeEffect], forbids: [].}

    forbids: [].}
